languages.text: "Если вы тут отрезаны от командования, то как происходит выдача званий?"
"If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"
languages.original_text: "Если вы тут отрезаны от командования, то как происходит выдача званий?"

traits.locale_text: "If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"
"If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"
"If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"
"If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"

languages.text: 「ここで指揮系統が断たれた場合、階級はどのように決まるか」
languages.original_text: "If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"

traits.locale_text: ここで指揮系統が断たれた場合、階級はどのように決まるのですか。

languages.text: « Si vous n'avez plus de contact avec le commandement, comment vos grades vous sont-ils attribués ? »
languages.original_text: "If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"

traits.locale_text: « Si vous n'avez plus de contact avec le commandement, comment vos grades vous sont-ils attribués ? »

languages.text: "Eğer burada komuta ile bağlantınız kesikse rütbeler nasıl veriliyor?"
languages.original_text: "If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"

traits.locale_text: "Eğer burada komuta ile bağlantınız kesikse rütbeler nasıl veriliyor?"

languages.text: «Si están apartados de sus superiores, ¿cómo asignan los rangos?».
languages.original_text: "If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"

traits.locale_text: «Si están apartados de sus superiores, ¿cómo asignan los rangos?».

languages.text: “如果你们与作战指挥断绝了联系，军衔又是如何任命的呢？”
languages.original_text: "If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"

traits.locale_text: “如果你们与作战指挥断绝了联系，军衔又是如何任命的呢？”

languages.text: "Wenn Ihr hier vom Oberkommando abgeschnitten seid, wie werden dann die Ränge ernannt?"
languages.original_text: "If you are cut off from command here, how are ranks appointed?"

traits.locale_text: "Wenn Ihr hier vom Oberkommando abgeschnitten seid, wie werden dann die Ränge ernannt?"
